direct.thesis: Telehealth platform dispensing compounded GLP-1s. Novo Nordisk partnership is key catalyst.
Ozempic/Wegovy maker. GLP-1 category leader.
Mounjaro/Zepbound. Dominant GLP-1 pipeline.
MariTide obesity drug in late-stage trials.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Bachem. Peptide API manufacturer. Wins regardless of which drug or brand wins. ~$3B cap, minimal analyst coverage on this angle.
Bruker. Analytical instruments used in peptide R&D and quality testing.

peptides.description: Peptide self-administration trend — GLP-1 weight loss, BPC-157 healing, TB-500 recovery. Moving from bodybuilding niche into mainstream wellness.

direct.thesis: Unity Biotechnology. Senolytic pipeline targeting age-related diseases. Micro-cap, speculative but real science.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Gilead Sciences. Aging biology research programs.

longevity.description: Anti-aging and longevity supplement/therapy trend. NMN, NAD+ precursors, rapamycin interest growing in biohacking communities.

direct.thesis: Life Time Health. Building dedicated pickleball courts at locations nationwide.
Acushnet Holdings. Racquet and ball sports equipment expansion.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Nike. Court shoes and apparel expanding into pickleball/padel.
Under Armour. Racquet sports apparel expansion.

pickleball.description: Fastest-growing sport in America. Court construction boom. Equipment market fragmented — no dominant pure-play public company yet.

direct.thesis: Pentair. Water treatment and filtration systems. Direct beneficiary of PFAS anxiety.
A.O. Smith. Water heaters and filtration. Consumer home water quality play.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Watts Water Technologies. Flow control and water quality infrastructure.

water_quality.description: PFAS/microplastics anxiety driving home water filtration upgrades. Regulatory tailwinds adding urgency.

red_light_therapy.description: At-home red light therapy devices exploding on Amazon. No clear pure-play public company yet — monitor for IPOs and acquisitions.

direct.thesis: Celsius Holdings. Functional supplement brand with creatine-adjacent wellness products.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Ingredion. Specialty ingredient supplier for nutrition and supplement manufacturers.

creatine_wellness.description: Creatine crossing from gym culture into mainstream wellness — brain health, women's fitness, aging. Massive category expansion.

direct.thesis: Monster Beverage. Functional energy category leader expanding into wellness drinks.
Celsius Holdings. Fitness/wellness functional energy drink. Strong Gen Z adoption.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Ingredion. Specialty ingredient supplier for functional beverage manufacturers.

functional_beverages.description: Adaptogen, nootropic, and electrolyte drink explosion. Moving from niche health stores to mainstream grocery.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Apple Watch sleep tracking driving device upgrade cycles.
Garmin. Sleep tracking wearables with broad consumer adoption.

sleep_optimization.description: Sleep optimization moving from biohackers to mainstream. Wearables, supplements, and environment products all growing.

direct.thesis: Enphase Energy. Residential solar microinverters and battery storage. Market leader.
SolarEdge. Residential solar optimizer.
Sunrun. Residential solar installer. Direct consumer play.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Albemarle. Lithium producer. Wins on battery storage growth regardless of brand.

home_energy.description: Grid anxiety and energy independence driving residential battery + solar adoption.

direct.thesis: Church & Dwight. Arm & Hammer and Waterpik brands. Direct oral health beneficiary.

oral_health.description: Oral health reinvention — hydroxyapatite replacing fluoride, water flossers going mainstream, holistic oral care trend.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Dexcom. Cold therapy drives interest in biometric tracking.

cold_plunge.description: Cold plunge going from elite athlete recovery to mainstream wellness. Home cold plunge unit market emerging.

direct.thesis: Dexcom. CGM market leader expanding beyond diabetics into wellness monitoring.
AbbVie (FreeStyle Libre). CGM device expanding into metabolic wellness.

continuous_glucose_monitor.description: Continuous glucose monitors crossing from diabetes management to mainstream metabolic health tracking.

direct.thesis: Freshpet. Fresh pet food — high protein trend extends to pet owners.
Beyond Meat. Plant protein trends connected to weight loss behavior change.

picks_and_shovels.thesis: Bachem. GLP-1 drug manufacturing. Downstream of weight loss drug trend.
Ingredion. Protein ingredient supplier benefiting from high-protein food trend.

weight_loss_behavior.description: GLP-1 drugs creating downstream behavior changes: high-protein eating, muscle preservation focus, resistance training surge.
